Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark
public class RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark extends Object
RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark

Mark data for a specific asset

  • Constructor Details

    • RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount, Optional<String> assetId, Optional<String> identifier, Optional<? extends RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkIdentifierType> identifierType, Optional<? extends MarkAbsenceReason> markAbsenceReason, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> markGenerationTime, Optional<? extends List<MarkPrice>> marks)

    • RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark()

  • Method Details

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount()
      The amount of accrued interest estimated to be exchanged given the requested quantity. Measured in a USD value with 2-decimal places of precision.

    • assetId

      public Optional<String> assetId()
      Apex Asset ID for this asset.

    • identifier

      public Optional<String> identifier()
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public Optional<RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkIdentifierType> identifierType()
      The identifier type of the asset being sought. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • markAbsenceReason

      public Optional<MarkAbsenceReason> markAbsenceReason()
      When marks are found and returned, this will be unspecified. If the asset was found, but no pricing data is returned, then: this will denote the reason, the marks[] list will be empty, and the accrued_interest_amount will not be present.

    • markGenerationTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> markGenerationTime()
      The time this mark data was generated

    • marks

      public Optional<List<MarkPrice>> marks()
      The set of marks available for this asset. If this is non-empty, then it will always contain a PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR typed price in it. Yield prices may not always be available, but never be present without a percentage of par value also returned.

    • builder

      public static RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder builder()

    • withAccruedInterestAmount

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark withAccruedInterestAmount(RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkAccruedInterestAmount accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of accrued interest estimated to be exchanged given the requested quantity. Measured in a USD value with 2-decimal places of precision.

    • withAccruedInterestAmount

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark withAccruedInterestAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of accrued interest estimated to be exchanged given the requested quantity. Measured in a USD value with 2-decimal places of precision.

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark withAssetId(String assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset.

      Apex Asset ID for this asset.

      The identifier type of the asset being sought. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • withIdentifierType

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark withIdentifierType(Optional<? extends RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkIdentifierType> identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being sought. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • withMarkAbsenceReason

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark withMarkAbsenceReason(MarkAbsenceReason markAbsenceReason)
      When marks are found and returned, this will be unspecified. If the asset was found, but no pricing data is returned, then: this will denote the reason, the marks[] list will be empty, and the accrued_interest_amount will not be present.

    • withMarkAbsenceReason

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark withMarkAbsenceReason(Optional<? extends MarkAbsenceReason> markAbsenceReason)
      When marks are found and returned, this will be unspecified. If the asset was found, but no pricing data is returned, then: this will denote the reason, the marks[] list will be empty, and the accrued_interest_amount will not be present.

    • withMarkGenerationTime

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark withMarkGenerationTime(OffsetDateTime markGenerationTime)
      The time this mark data was generated

    • withMarkGenerationTime

      The time this mark data was generated

    • withMarks

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark withMarks(List<MarkPrice> marks)
      The set of marks available for this asset. If this is non-empty, then it will always contain a PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR typed price in it. Yield prices may not always be available, but never be present without a percentage of par value also returned.

    • withMarks

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark withMarks(Optional<? extends List<MarkPrice>> marks)
      The set of marks available for this asset. If this is non-empty, then it will always contain a PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR typed price in it. Yield prices may not always be available, but never be present without a percentage of par value also returned.
